header.tagline: A colorful, safe challenge world for kids
sidebar.legal.title: Marifetli Kids legal
landing.footerTrust: Parent-approved signup · Respect for your data · Have fun
landing.modalHelp: Pick a tab and enter your credentials.
landing.feature.connect.title: Connect instantly
landing.feature.connect.body: Teacher, parent, and student stay in one flow with feedback and notifications.
landing.feature.window.title: Open a window into their world
landing.feature.window.body: Capture class energy through challenge submissions and free posts.
landing.feature.calendar.title: Stay on top of events
landing.feature.calendar.body: Track upcoming deadlines and announcements like a calendar.
landing.feature.grow.title: Help them grow their own way
landing.feature.grow.body: With badge road, challenge progress, and games, kids progress at their own pace.
landing.feature.classroom.title: Build your best classroom
landing.feature.classroom.body: Manage invites, challenges, and reviews from one teacher panel.
landing.heroSubtitle: Complete your teacher challenges, shine in freestyle, and progress on the badge road - all in one safe kid-friendly place.
landing.card.challengesBody: Submit with text, image, or video; teacher feedback appears right in your panel.
landing.card.freestyleBody: Share your own ideas and shine beyond the classroom.
landing.card.badgeBody: Progress, celebrate, and stay motivated with gamified mini wins.
landing.game.title: Learn easier with games
landing.game.body: Learn while having fun with memory, addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division games. Level up, build combos, complete daily tasks, and earn badges.
landing.studentCardBody: Register via invite link and join your class. Use the button below or login modal.
landing.teacherCardBody: Class/challenge management, invites, and star of the week - account is opened by admin.
landing.studentModalHint: If you do not have an account, sign up with your teacher invite link. Parent tab can also help route to student panel.
landing.parentModalHint: Parent account opens with the email and password created during class invite sign-up.
landing.teacherModalHint: Your account must be created by an administrator.
landing.studentLoginSubtitle: Sign-up is only through teacher invite.
landing.parentLoginSubtitle: Use the parent email/password set during invite registration.
landing.teacherLoginSubtitle: Use your email/password to manage class and challenges.
profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: You can update your name and upload a profile photo.
profile.file.typeError: Please select JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
profile.file.sizeError: File size must be at most 2 MB.
profile.photo.hint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP · up to 2 MB
profile.language.hint.free: You will see Kids in this language.
profile.language.hint.locked: Student language is automatically set by the class language setting.
student.panel.toast.title: Great news from your teacher!
student.dashboard.heroBody: Follow your badge path and manage challenges on their own page — your teacher's star is with you.
student.dashboard.growthHint1: Keep earning points for the next badge
student.dashboard.classesEmpty: You are not enrolled in a class yet — join with your teacher's invite link.
student.dashboard.challengesBody: Multi-step challenges save each submission separately. Open the full list and your progress here.
student.projects.pageSubtitle: Each card is an adventure — submit step by step, get feedback, collect stars.
student.projects.noAssignments: No challenges are live right now.
student.projects.emptyOngoingDescDone: You have finished the required submissions for all published challenges. Check the Completed tab for summaries.
student.projects.emptyDoneDesc: Challenges where you sent all required steps appear here. Start from the In progress tab.
student.projects.emptyExpiredDesc: Challenges past the deadline that you left incomplete appear here.
student.starOverlay.title: Teacher's star!
student.starOverlay.body: You are among the standout submissions in this challenge — well done!
student.motivation.mid0: Nice work! You finished this step — you'll shine on the next one too.
student.motivation.mid1: You put in effort and it shows; the adventure goes on.
student.motivation.mid2: Awesome! Each step makes you stronger; keep going.
student.motivation.mid3: Bravo! Your teacher will see your effort; shine on the next step too.
student.motivation.mid4: Great job! Small steps lead to big wins — keep it up.
student.motivation.mid5: Well done! This round is done; take a breath and move to the next step.
student.motivation.final0: You finished every step! You're a star — be proud.
student.motivation.final1: You completed the topic from start to end. Filiz is cheering!
student.motivation.final2: Last step done! You crowned this challenge — amazing.
teacher.panel.academicYearRequired: Academic year must be set for this school.
teacher.panel.duplicateClass: A similar class exists in this school. You can join that class.
teacher.panel.subtitle: Select school, create class, and manage invites/challenges.
teacher.panel.whichSchoolHint: This class will be linked to the selected school.
teacher.panel.academicYearHint: This value comes automatically from admin settings.
parent.panel.chatUpdateRequired: Update required. Refresh and try again.
parent.panel.title: Parent panel
parent.panel.subtitle: Track your child's progress, feedback, and approvals here.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: New challenge and submission notifications are listed here.
messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Parent and teacher conversations are listed here.
messages.passwordModalBody: Enter your account password to view parent messages.
messageDetail.imageTooLarge: Image can be at most 10 MB
messageDetail.fileTooLarge: File can be at most 20 MB
messageDetail.startConversation: Send the first message to start the conversation.
messageDetail.messagePlaceholder: Write a message... (Enter: send, Shift+Enter: new line)
announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.classRequired: You must select a class for announcement.
announcements.assignClassFirst: You must be assigned to a class first.
announcements.attachmentHint: You can add multiple files. Image 10 MB, document 20 MB.
announcements.noExistingAttachment: No existing attachment on this announcement.
announcements.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this announcement?
tests.studentReport.loadError: Student detail could not be loaded
tests.studentReport.notSubmittedYet: This student has not submitted the test yet.
roadmap.title: Badge road
roadmap.subtitle: Each node is a badge. Points never decrease; challenge stars keep accumulating.
roadmap.challengeStarsHint: Highlighted submissions picked by teacher. Max {limit} stars per challenge.

tests.reports.title: Reports
tests.reports.subtitle: Select class and test to open a report.
tests.reports.noTests: No reportable tests in this class.
tests.studentList.title: Tests
tests.studentList.empty: There are no assigned tests right now.
tests.studentSolve.autoSubmitted: Time is up, test was submitted automatically
tests.teacherMain.imageSizeError: Some images were skipped due to size limit (max 12MB).

tests.teacherMain.uploadAtLeastOneImage: You must upload at least one image

tests.teacherMain.invalidQuestions: Each question needs text, at least 2 choices, and a correct answer
tests.teacherMain.savedAndCanDistribute: Test saved. You can select it above and distribute to classes.
tests.teacherMain.title: Tests
tests.teacherMain.subtitle: Upload test images, convert with AI, edit, and send to class.
tests.teacherMain.distributeHint: You can send one test to multiple classes.
tests.teacherMain.durationHint: This value is the saved duration for the test.
tests.teacherMain.noUploadedTests: You have no uploaded tests yet.
tests.teacherMain.uploadHelp: JPG/PNG/WebP supported. Multi-page upload allowed (max 10 images, each up to 12MB).
tests.teacherMain.uploadHint: You can upload multiple pages (example: 2-3 pages). Send separate tests for different classes.
tests.teacherMain.step3: 3) Edit questions and set correct answers
reset.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.invalidLinkBody: Password reset link is missing or invalid.
reset.redirecting: Redirecting to the page with login modal...
reset.newPasswordSubtitle: Set a new password for your Marifetli Kids account (student or teacher).
homework.title: My Homeworks
competitions.mustSelectDates: You must select start and end dates.
competitions.mustSelectValidDatetime: You must select a valid date and time.
competitions.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
competitions.minDuration: Competition must be at least 30 minutes.
competitions.endInFuture: End time must be in the future.
competitions.sentToParent: Your proposal was sent to the parent account. You will be notified after approval.
competitions.sentToTeacher: Your proposal was sent to the teacher. You will be notified after approval.
competitions.title: Competitions
competitions.freeCompBody: not tied to class; you join only with parent approval.
competitions.teacherHomeworkNote: (Teacher homework is in the Challenges page.)
competitions.windowClosed: Competition window is closed or not started yet; you cannot accept.
competitions.topicHint: All rounds are grouped under this title (like teacher homework).
competitions.roundCountLabel: How many separate challenge rounds for this topic?
competitions.roundCountHint: Shown as Challenge 1, Challenge 2 in student panel (1-5).
competitions.startDateTimeHint: Invites/joins stay closed until this time; saved using server time.
competitions.endDateTimeHint: After this time, invite accepts and new invites are disabled (min 30 minutes).
schools.saved: School saved - you can select it while creating class.
schools.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this school? It cannot be deleted if classes are attached.
schools.title: My schools
teacherClass.assignments.newSubtitle: For image submissions, student uploads 1 image per round.
teacherClass.assignments.videoEnabled: You can also allow video submissions.
teacherClass.assignments.videoDisabled: Video submissions are disabled in this setup.
teacherClass.assignments.title: Title
teacherClass.assignments.materialsPlaceh: You can write as a list
teacherClass.assignments.openAtHint: If start time is in the future, challenge stays planned until then; students see it at start time.
teacherClass.assignments.closeAtHint: Students can submit only until this time.
teacherClass.assignments.rulesHint: How should students submit this challenge?
teacherClass.assignments.imageModeHint: Submit with text and image; 1 image per round.
teacherClass.assignments.videoLimitHint: Uploaded/shared video should not exceed this limit.
teacherClass.assignments.roundCount: How many separate challenge submissions for this topic?
teacherClass.assignments.roundCountHint: Shown as Challenge 1, Challenge 2 on student panel (1-5).
teacherClass.assignments.listHint: Planned challenges appear at start time. Open ones are visible now in student panel.
teacherClass.assignments.plannedHint: Students are notified around start time.
teacherClass.invite.title: Parent invite
teacherClass.invite.subtitle: Create a class-specific signup link and share it via WhatsApp, SMS or class group.
teacherClass.invite.linkValidityHint: Create a new link when it expires.
teacherClass.invite.shareableLinkHint: Share this address with parents. Multiple families can use it until expiry.
teacherClass.invite.emailSubtitle: Enter parent emails to send one-time signup links from the system.
teacherClass.invite.emailDisabled: Bulk email invite is disabled by institution settings; use the invite link above.
teacherClass.students.title: Enrolled students
teacherClass.students.subtitle: Each row shows published challenge count and how many were submitted at least once.
teacherClass.students.emptyDesc: Students who register with invite link or email invite appear here.
teacherClass.general.title: Class details
teacherClass.general.subtitle: Update class name, description and linked school. School assignments are managed from admin panel.
teacherClass.general.schoolHint: Province/district/neighborhood are only in school card; not entered again on class.
teacherClass.general.customClassNameHint: Use free text for club or custom groups. Use standard mode below for regular classes.
teacherClass.general.academicYearHint: This is defined in admin panel; teacher panel is read-only.
teacherClass.general.languageHint: Students in this class will use the panel in this language.
teacherClass.general.descriptionHint: Short info shown to students and parents.
teacherClass.general.dangerHint: Deleting class permanently removes enrollments, challenges and submissions tied to this class.
teacherClass.assignments.card.imageOrVid: Image or video · max {sec} sec video · {rounds} rounds
teacherClass.assignments.card.plannedHid: Planned - students do not see yet
teacherClass.assignments.card.studentsWi: Students will be notified at start time.
teacherClass.assignments.editFreeHint: In planned/draft challenge you can edit all fields.
teacherClass.assignments.editLockedHint: In live challenge, start and round count are locked; other fields can be updated.
teacherClass.assignments.editOpenAtHintF: For planned challenge, start and deadline are required; start must be before deadline.
teacherClass.assignments.editOpenAtHintL: This challenge is live; to edit start date it must be planned.
teacherClass.assignments.editRoundLocked: This value cannot be changed for live challenge.
teacherClass.assignments.mobileHint: New challenge on left, summary and ratio on right. Open a challenge for details.
teacherClass.assignments.openAtRequired: Select submission start date and time.
teacherClass.assignments.plannedSuccess: Challenge planned. Students will be notified at start time.
teacherClass.assignments.publishedSucces: Challenge is now visible to students.
teacherClass.general.deleteConfirm: Delete class "{name}" permanently? Enrollments, challenges and submissions will be removed.
teacherClass.general.selectSchoolError: Select linked school for this class.
teacherClass.invite.emailFailed: Email could not be sent; try again later.
teacherClass.invite.enterEmailOrUseLink: Enter at least one email or use invite link above.
teacherClass.invite.firstLinkCopied: First invite link copied to clipboard; share manually if needed.
teacherClass.invite.linkCreatedCopyBelow: Invite link created. You can copy below.
teacherClass.invite.savedButEmailFailed: Invites saved but email sending failed
teacherClass.peer.empty: No competition records in this class yet.
teacherClass.peer.subtitle: Student peer competition proposals are listed here. After approval, starter can send invites.
teacherClass.peer.title: Class competitions
teacherClass.stars.loadHint: Use button above to load this week list.
teacherClass.stars.subtitle: Students with most submissions in last 7 days; growth points and badge level are shown.
teacherClass.stars.title: Star of the week
teacherClass.students.removeConfirm: Remove {name} from this class? Challenge submissions in this class will also be deleted; user account stays.
freestyle.title: Free board
freestyle.subtitle: Share your own work here apart from class challenges.
freestyle.linksPlaceholder: Image / video links (separate by line or comma)
invite.enterAtLeastOneChild: Enter at least one child information.
invite.validUntil: This invite is valid until about
invite.multipleChildrenHint: You can add multiple children for same class (max 10).
invite.submit: Create parent and child accounts / join class
teacherHomework.title: Homework Management
competitionDetail.notFoundOrUnauthorized: You cannot view this competition or it was not found.
competitionDetail.roundInfo.single: This topic has a single challenge step.
competitionDetail.pendingTeacherHint: Waiting for teacher approval. Once approved, you can invite classmates from here.
competitionDetail.pendingParentHint: Waiting for parent account approval. Once approved, only you can join this freestyle competition.
competitionDetail.freeBody: This competition is not open to classmates; only you participate with parent approval. You can continue your challenge submissions from the student projects/challenges flow.
competitionDetail.inviteFriendsBody: You can invite the whole class at once or pick students one by one. Accepted invites join the competition.
competitionDetail.inviteWindowClosed: Competition has not started yet or already ended; you cannot send new invites now.
competitionDetail.inviteAllHint: Already joined students and pending invites are skipped.
competitionDetail.notMemberHint: You are not part of this competition yet. Accept an invite from notifications or the competitions list.
competitions.proposalHint: Like teacher homework, you propose one topic and choose how many challenge steps it has (Challenge 1, 2, ...). Class mode may have limits; freestyle mode requires parent approval.
competitions.classModeRequiresClass: You need a class enrollment for class competition; join a class first via teacher invite.
competitions.freeModeHint: You need a linked parent account in your profile. Parent approves from Kids parent panel; no classmate invites in this mode.
competitions.yoursHint: All your competitions are listed here; open one for details and invites.
competitions.emptyYours: You do not have any competition yet. Use the form on the left to send a proposal.
projectDetail.savedLoadError: Saved submission could not be loaded
projectDetail.roundLocked: You must complete Step {round} submission first.
teacher.panel.schoolClassesLoadError: School classes could not be fetched
teacher.panel.noClassWithoutSchool: Add your school from the left steps first, then pick it in the same card to create your first class.
teacher.panel.noClassWithSchool: Select your school and set grade/section in the left card to create your first class; then open the class page for parent invites.
teacherProjectDetail.loadError: Could not load challenge or submissions
teacher.panel.descriptionHint: Optional. You can write age group, time, or focus area.
teacher.panel.descriptionPlaceholder: What will be done in this class?
teacher.panel.afterCreateHint: Then open the class to add parent invites and challenges.
childrenStatus.subtitle: Track challenge history, homework history, and pending parent approvals here.
gameCenter.title: Game center
gameCenter.subtitle: Play educational games for your class level, earn points and badges. Which game will you shine in today?
gameCenter.difficulty.title: Difficulty
gameCenter.question: Question
gameCenter.word.selectInOrder: Select letters in the correct order
projectDetail.videoTooLong: Video is too long (about {current} sec). Maximum is {max} sec.
projectDetail.videoDurationOk: Duration looks good (~{current} sec). Do not forget to paste the link below.
projectDetail.maxImages: You can add up to {count} images.
projectDetail.notFound: This challenge was not found or not assigned to you.
projectDetail.submitModeSteps: 📝 Step-by-step text submission + 1 image per round.
projectDetail.submitModeBoth: 🎬📝 Video limit: {max} sec · You can choose image or video
projectDetail.windowNotStarted: Submission window has not started yet. You can submit after the start time.
projectDetail.windowEndedReadonly: Submission window has ended. Content below is read-only; new submissions and edits are disabled. Teacher feedback remains visible.
projectDetail.windowEnded: Submission window has ended. You can no longer submit or edit this challenge.
projectDetail.starBody: Teacher highlighted this submission in this challenge. It will also appear on the badge path.
projectDetail.missedWindow: You did not submit before the deadline for this challenge; submission can no longer be added.
projectDetail.videoRequired: Video submission is required for this challenge.
projectDetail.stepsRequired: Step-by-step text submission is required for this challenge.
projectDetail.stepPlaceholder: What did you do? Write here...
projectDetail.imageHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP · 1 image per round
projectDetail.caption: Short explanation / summary
parent.panel.gameControlBody: Set daily minute limit, time window, and game-based permissions per child.
parent.panel.noChildSummary: No linked child summary yet. If registration via teacher invite is complete, refresh; if issue continues contact support.
parent.panel.chatStartNotice: Messaging will start for {student} with teacher {teacher} ({class}).
parentControls.title: Parent controls
parentControls.subtitle: Manage your children's game time, allowed hours, and game permissions here.
parentControls.childSummaryHint: Child summary: game status is shown separately for each child.
parentControls.openAllForSelected: Open all games for selected child
parentControls.closeAllForSelected: Close all games for selected child
teacher.panel.needSchoolFirst: You need to add a school first
teacher.panel.needSchoolFirstBody: It looks like this account has not yet been assigned a school by admin. A class must be linked to a school.
teacher.panel.needSchoolStep1: Assign the teacher to a school from the admin panel.
teacher.panel.needSchoolStep2: After assignment, school selection will open on this page and you can create a class.
teacher.panel.needSchoolFooter: School management is temporarily available only from the admin panel.
teacher.panel.createNewClassBody: Select your school, choose grade and section, then save. A separate class record is created for each academic year.
teacher.panel.noClassInSelectedSchool: No classes yet in the selected school.
schools.subtitle: Pick your school from the MEB directory and save; if missing, add it manually. Province and district stay aligned with MEB data in both flows.
schools.teacherOnlySubtitle: Schools are defined by admin and assigned to you. You can view assigned schools below and edit name/address if needed; contact admin to add a new school.
schools.teacherOnlyCardBody: New school records and quota management are available only in the Admin panel. Your assigned schools appear on the right.
schools.pickHint: First select province and district, then find your school in the list. If not found, create one with Add school.
schools.mebSchoolHint: When you open the list, you can narrow it with the search box.
schools.schoolNameHint: Shorten or correct if needed; this text will be used in the record.
schools.noMebSchoolInDistrict: No record for this district in MEB list. You can add your school with the button below.
schools.manualAddHint: Province and district are still selected from the MEB list; you only enter the school name.
schools.noneTeacherOnlyDesc: If your assigned school is not visible, contact admin.
schools.noneDesc: Pick from MEB on the left or add a school; then select it while creating a class.
teacherProjectDetail.challengeDetailSumm: Challenge details - purpose, materials, submission type (click)
teacherProjectDetail.submissionType.imag: Image or video - video max {sec} sec - {rounds} separate challenges
Image - {rounds} separate challenges - 1 image per round
invite.parentFlow: First a parent account (email + password) is created; the child does not need their own email. Easiest path to child panel: parent login -> switch to child panel. Optionally the child can also log in with username + child password. Parent session will be used for future content approvals.
invite.parentEmailHint: Parent login and notifications are sent to this address. A separate username is created for child login.
admin.title: Admin - teachers and schools
admin.subtitle: Create teacher accounts here; manage schools and student limits. Teachers cannot create schools - assignments are done by admin.
admin.teacher.createdAndMailed: Teacher added and login details sent by email.
admin.class.teacherAssignedBySubject: Teacher assigned to class with subject.
admin.errors.studentCapMinOne: Student limit must be at least 1.
admin.errors.demoDatesRequired: Start and end dates are required together for demo.
admin.errors.demoDateOrder: Demo end date cannot be before start date.
admin.errors.mebSchoolAddFailed: Could not add school to MEB list
admin.errors.teacherSubjectMissing: Teacher subject is not defined. Select a subject from teacher card first.
admin.schoolAssign.label: School assignment (optional)
admin.schoolAssign.searchPlaceholder: Search by school name, province or district...
admin.form.subject: Subject
admin.hint.addSchoolBeforeTeacher: Add a school below first; then you can link the teacher while creating the account.
admin.classAssign.title: Assign teacher to class
admin.classAssign.subtitle: After creating the teacher account and choosing a subject, link them to a class here.
admin.teacher.emailFailedToast: Email could not be sent.{detail} Share the temporary password with the teacher securely: {password}
admin.toast.mebSchoolCreated: School added to MEB list. It is now selected above; save with student limit.
admin.toast.mebSchoolExisted: This school was already in the MEB list. It has been selected above; save with student limit.
admin.subjects.title: Subject management
admin.subjects.subtitle: Manage the subject list shown for class assignments.
admin.certificate.title: Certificate targets
admin.certificate.subtitle: Manage weekly/monthly certificate step targets for the student panel.
admin.schools.sectionSubtitle: For demo and sales schools the main control is the student limit. When full, new students cannot register.
admin.schools.newSchoolSubtitle: Pick province and district and find the school in the MEB list. If missing, create a manual record with "Add school".
admin.schools.mebListMissingBefore: No MEB school list in the database. On the server run
admin.schools.demoToSalesHint: You can switch from Demo to Sales here.
admin.schools.managedByCap: Records for this school are managed by the single student limit.
admin.schools.addModalBody: If the school is not in the MEB list, add province, district and name here. Then pick it from the MEB list above and create the school record with student limit.
admin.schools.modalNamePlaceholder: Official or short name you use
teacherProjectDetail.submissionsHelp: On mobile each round is a narrow row; tap to expand (accordion). On wide screens rounds appear side by side. Tap the left block for a student to see all rounds (thumbnails + text). Tap an image on the card for fullscreen. After saving, if another is queued the next submission opens. "Not submitted" lists enrolled students who never sent a submission for this challenge.
teacherProjectDetail.emptyMissing.noEnro: No enrolled students in this class.
teacherProjectDetail.emptyMissing.allSub: No enrolled students are left without a submission; everyone appears to have submitted at least once.
invite.emailLockedHint: Registration will use the parent email from the invitation; you cannot change it here.
invite.phoneHint: Digits only; if you start with +90 it will be normalized. Optional.
schools.addModalTeacherBody: If the school is not in the MEB list, add it here. Province and district are taken from MEB data in the system.
schools.shortNamePlaceholder: Official or short name you use
